leadText: The Purple Nectar (Japanese: むらさきのミツ Purple Nectar) is an item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the nectars associated with Oricorio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on an Oricorio , it changes it to Sensu Style . It can only be used outside of battle. It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A flower nectar obtained at Poni Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon. S V Flower nectar obtained from a purple flower. It changes the form of a certain species of Pokémon.
